title: If you were to be an Angel which one would you be
display_title: If you were to be an Angel which one would you be
wikitext:
[]: If you were to be an Angel which one would you be??             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Mon Nov 15, 2004 5:43 pm Dont know if there has been one like this but what the hell. ~The poll system sucks big balls so I cant put a poll down sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Mon Nov 15, 2004 7:55 pm Sefoniel, who makes dreams come true (literally).

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Nov 16, 2004 9:31 am er....angels in eva? or angels in general?

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 16, 2004 3:17 pm Angels not Evas Adam-First Angel Lilith-Second Angel Sachiel-Third Angel Samshel-Fourth Angel Ramiel-Fifth Angel Gaghiel-Sixth Angel Israfel-Seventh Angel Sandalphon-Eight Angel Matarael-Ninth Angel Sahaquiel-Tenth Angel Ireul-Eleventh Angel Leliel-Twelfth Angel Bardiel-Thirteenth Angel Zereul-Fourteenth Angel Arael-Fifteenth Angel Armisael-Sixteenth Angel Tabris-Seventeenth Angel

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Nov 16, 2004 3:26 pm why do i have a feeling that this thread is gonna be locked soon? anyway if i could be an angel i'd like to be Tabris..

[]: Re: If you were to be an Angel which one would you be??             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Nov 16, 2004 4:49 pm Dark FireStar wrote: Dont know if there has been one like this but what the hell.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 16, 2004 4:51 pm Hey I was only human. We Immortals only have a limited amount of patience.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Wed Nov 17, 2004 10:00 am sure... before this topic gets locked however, i would say tabris.... though zeruel is a close second...

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Wed Nov 17, 2004 3:29 pm Well yeah Tabrius is kool and all but where would you all be with out the Begining himself (drum roll)....... ME (cricket sounds) ........Okay (grumbles) I'd be the first the BEST the one and only...(drum roll) ADAM the First Angel (applause)

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Wed Nov 17, 2004 8:29 pm I would be Arael.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sat Nov 20, 2004 10:00 pm heehee, I'd be Sachiel, for no aparent reason... ...ooh, no. I'd be Sachiel so I could roam around Tokyo-3 and maybe go fishing in the lake as well. yeah, good times.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 21, 2004 1:58 am Dark FireStar wrote: ........Okay (grumbles) I'd be the first the BEST the one and only...(drum roll) ADAM the First Angel (applause)

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Sun Nov 21, 2004 8:42 am Reichu wrote: Dark FireStar wrote: ........Okay (grumbles) I'd be the first the BEST the one and only...(drum roll) ADAM the First Angel (applause)

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Nov 21, 2004 9:40 am i don't think that angels have gender..

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Nov 21, 2004 11:49 am I agree with seventh child. I was under the assumption that angels were supposed to be sexless. Is this true? Could anybody actually verify this? If so, please do, I'm currious^^. To be frank, my knowledge of angels comes from a couple days in sunday school, Evangelion, and watching Kevin Smith's Dogma a bunch of times^^....I'm ignorant, I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Nov 21, 2004 12:37 pm Kiel wrote: I agree with seventh child. I was under the assumption that angels were supposed to be sexless. Is this true? Could anybody actually verify this? If so, please do, I'm currious^^. To be frank, my knowledge of angels comes from a couple days in sunday school, Evangelion, and watching Kevin Smith's Dogma a bunch of times^^....I'm ignorant, I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Sun Nov 21, 2004 1:53 pm Not all species have the females give birth. The male seahorse, for example, keeps the fertilized eggs with him until they hatch. Other species can change their sex, which is known as spawning. I don't think, in the canon storyline, angels have genders any way, since they're basically immortal (Not getting technical.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 21, 2004 3:57 pm Kaworu refers to Adam as "the existence that is our mother". Yeah, he was being "poetic", but he could have just as easily called Adam "father", you know? As far as angels not having gender -- there's no real evidence either way, except in Lilith's case. Since this is anime, of course they're not going to show where the LCL is coming from, but it's not that hard to figure out. Phaze wrote: Not all species have the females give birth. The male seahorse, for example, keeps the fertilized eggs with him until they hatch.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Nov 21, 2004 4:20 pm Reichu wrote: Kaworu refers to Adam as "the existence that is our mother". Yeah, he was being "poetic", but he could have just as easily called Adam "father", you know? As far as angels not having gender -- there's no real evidence either way, except in Lilith's case. Since this is anime, of course they're not going to show where the LCL is coming from, but it's not that hard to figure out.

[]:             Quote Post by Oblivious » Sun Nov 21, 2004 10:01 pm Lilith. Just because both Rei and Unit 01 are cloned from her. If I am a guy would thinking that be weird? o.O;;
